articles.title: Prediction-market fears dominate Atlantic City conclave
articles.summary: Prediction market executives and regulators gathered in Atlantic City to hash out concerns about the industry's rapid growth and potential regulatory crackdowns. The conclave signals that institutional fears about market manipulation, underage betting, and political interference are reaching a tipping point that could reshape how these platforms operate.

articles.title: Do prediction markets make money from other peoples’ misery? | Fiona Katauskas
articles.summary: Someone's questioning whether prediction markets profit off human suffering and tragic events. The critique matters because public perception of markets betting on disasters or deaths could trigger regulatory crackdowns that hurt the entire industry.

articles.title: Fanatics adds combos to prediction markets platform
articles.summary: Fanatics is rolling out combination bets on its prediction markets platform, letting users bundle multiple outcomes into single wagers. The move signals Fanatics is pushing deeper into sophisticated betting products to compete with established players like DraftKings and FanDuel for high-value customers.

articles.title: Can the S&P 500 sustain momentum? What Polymarket, analysts say
articles.summary: The S&P 500's recent rally has traders and analysts divided on whether the momentum can continue into 2024. Polymarket odds on market direction give bettors a real-time pulse check that often moves faster than traditional Wall Street forecasts, making it prime territory for contrarian plays against consensus thinking.

articles.title: Everything is gambling now: the latest news on prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi
articles.summary: Prediction markets are spreading beyond politics and finance into everything from weather forecasts to celebrity gossip, turning daily life into a series of tradable outcomes. This explosion of bet-able events creates massive new liquidity opportunities but also risks diluting serious predictive markets with noise and entertainment gambling.

articles.title: Ninth Circuit panel appears to lean Nevada’s way in legal battle with Kalshi, Crypto.com
articles.summary: A Ninth Circuit panel seems inclined to side with Nevada in its legal fight against prediction market Kalshi and crypto exchange Crypto.com. If Nevada wins, it could set a precedent that strengthens state gambling regulators' ability to challenge prediction markets operating without local licenses.

articles.title: Trump’s top regulator for prediction markets pledges crackdown on insider trading
articles.summary: Trump's incoming financial regulator plans to crack down on insider trading within prediction markets, signaling tighter oversight of the industry. This could force platforms to beef up their monitoring systems and potentially reduce the information advantages that some sophisticated traders currently exploit.

articles.title: Schwab Considering Prediction Markets Tied to Finance Events
articles.summary: Charles Schwab is exploring launching prediction markets that would let users bet on financial events like Fed rate decisions, earnings reports, or market movements. If Schwab pulls the trigger, it would bring prediction markets to millions of retail investors who currently stick to traditional trading, potentially creating the biggest liquidity injection the space has ever seen.

articles.title: A Polymarket trader made $300,000 betting on Biden's pardons, a new analysis shows
articles.summary: A trader on Polymarket scored $300,000 by correctly predicting which pardons President Biden would issue, according to new analysis of the platform's betting data. The windfall shows how political prediction markets are expanding beyond elections into granular executive decisions, creating fresh profit opportunities for bettors willing to track presidential patterns.

articles.title: The Newest Prediction Markets Guru Is a Middle Schooler in Braces
articles.summary: A middle school kid with braces is apparently crushing it on prediction markets and gaining a following as a forecasting expert. This matters because if a 13-year-old can outpredict adults with decades of experience, it either proves the markets are broken or that raw analytical thinking beats conventional wisdom.

articles.title: Kalshi's not having a good time in Ohio
articles.summary: Kalshi is facing regulatory pushback or legal troubles in Ohio that's disrupting their operations in the state. This signals growing scrutiny of prediction markets at the state level, which could create a patchwork of regulations that makes expansion harder for platforms trying to go mainstream.

articles.title: Kalshi Expands Commodity Predictions Market Amid War Volatility
articles.summary: Kalshi is launching new commodity prediction markets as geopolitical conflicts drive wild price swings in oil, wheat, and other raw materials. War-fueled volatility creates perfect conditions for traders to profit from commodity bets, giving Kalshi a fresh revenue stream while established players like CME face regulatory headwinds.
